objective.job: Turn a meeting transcript into a shippable daily log
objective.user: Team member running the daily straight off a call
objective.context: Right after a meeting - capture what happened without letting the day drift into a deep thread that can't ship
objective.success_feeling: The day stays deliverable; deep threads are captured but parked, not derailing today

outputs.criteria: Pick the one type that best fits what the transcript describes
Only items that can realistically be completed within one working day; each names a concrete deliverable
Threads that are turning deep or multi-day. Each object has thread, why_parked, and a concrete next_step so nothing is lost
Concrete things stopping progress, drawn from the transcript
A specific customer signal mentioned on the call, or 'none'
One honest sentence about the day; if nothing shipped, say why

constraints: Every ships_today item must be completable in one working day; anything larger belongs in parked_deep
parked_deep must name both why the thread was parked and the smallest concrete next step
Extract only what the transcript supports - never invent decisions, work, or customer quotes
If nothing is shippable today, return an empty ships_today and explain in takeaway rather than inflating scope
Prefer specific nouns (a customer, a metric, a feature) over vague verbs

auto_checks: parked_deep items each have a next_step
human_review: Did we correctly park the thread that went too deep?
